Back My role as your MP Constituency Surgeries Casework Parliament Visits Office Standards Folder: Accountable to you Back My Priorities My Visits Annual Report Bletchley Investment Taskforce Work for me Contact me News and views Standing up for your priorities Before and after the election, I have been speaking to voters, trade unionists, farmers, businesses, and civil society leaders from across Buckingham, Bletchley, Tattenhoe, Winslow and the surrounding villages to understand people’s concerns. People have told me they want a fresh start, and I have listened. As your Labour MP, I’ll stand up for your priorities to fresh hope, fresh opportunities and importantly, a fresh start. Boost household incomes Wages flatlined under the Conservatives. As someone with financial services experience, I recognise the importance of enabling local businesses to access finance for growth, innovation, and job creation. I'm also a dedicated trade unionist, who strongly believes in the need for responsible business practices, such as proper living wages and decent working conditions. The incoming East-West Rail line will place Winslow, Buckingham and Bletchley right at the heart of the Oxford-Cambridge arc: an area which has the potential to become a world-leading and globally renowned centre for business. I will work tirelessly to make sure families in our towns and villages see the benefits and get the opportunities those links will bring. As your MP, I will: · Fight for stronger workers’ rights - including banning fire and rehire, establishing Fair Pay Agreements and extending statutory maternity and paternity leave. · Set up an Investment Taskforce , bringing together local employers, the South Central Institute of Technology and civil society. This Taskforce will aim to to attract the new businesses, jobs and apprenticeships so that Bletchley can fully realise the promise of its Town Deal. · Campaign for business rates reform , so that we properly support the small businesses, village pubs and independent shops that give life to Buckingham High Street, Winslow High Street, Bletchley’s Queensway, Fenny Stratford High Street and our villages. Tackle the cost of living The Tory cost of living crisis has affected working people across Buckingham and Bletchley. I've regularly come across families struggling to meet the soaring costs of housing, energy and food. Our Labour Government will end the cycle of higher prices, higher interest rates and higher taxes - and will put money back into the pockets of hardworking people and their families. As your MP, I will: · Champion an industrial strategy that delivers investment in renewable energy sources like solar, wind and biomass, so that we keep energy bills low for good. · Campaign for planning reform and the cash that councils need to build more homes — so that every family has the security of a genuinely affordable and environmentally sustainable home. · Convene local farmers, food manufacturers and retailers to agree measures that tackle local food insecurity and reduce the weekly food bill for families. Repair our local NHS Getting a GP or dental appointment has never been harder. Waiting lists remain far too long.
